payload.purpose_context: Availability of mission types is answered today by two disconnected authorities: a filesystem glob (list_available_missions) and the charter activation set. On top of that, a project with no activation config silently falls back to all four built-ins, and fresh 'init' never provisions the default charter. This mission collapses availability onto one authority — the charter activation set backed by the provisioned default charter — so a mission type present on disk but not activated is neither offered nor resolvable. The riskier runtime-template-discovery flip is deferred to a follow-up gated on templates-as-config (#2658).
payload.purpose_tldr: Make the charter activation set the single authority for which mission types are available, retiring the implicit 'all built-in' default and the filesystem-glob enumeration.
